name: Tabs
description: Tabs switch between related views of the same subject — a vehicle's Overview, Trips, Maintenance, and Alerts — without leaving the page. They keep peer views one click apart.
keyRule: Use tabs for peer views of one record or population. They're not top-level navigation (that's the drawer) and not a wizard (that's a stepper).

variants.name: Fixed
variants.whenToUse: A small, known set of tabs that fit the width.

variants.name: Scrollable
variants.whenToUse: Many tabs that overflow; the bar scrolls.

variants.name: With icon / count
variants.whenToUse: Reinforce a tab or show a count (e.g. "Alerts 3").

anatomy.name: Tab
anatomy.description: one view label, optionally with an icon or count.

anatomy.name: Active indicator
anatomy.description: the underline marking the selected tab.

anatomy.name: Panel
anatomy.description: the content for the active tab.

behaviors.name: Selection
behaviors.description: Selecting a tab swaps the panel and moves the indicator; one tab is always active.

behaviors.name: Overflow
behaviors.description: When tabs exceed the width, the bar scrolls rather than wrapping.

behaviors.name: Deep linking
behaviors.description: The active tab can be reflected in the URL so a view is shareable.

props.name: items
props.description: The tab list; each item can carry a label, optional icon, and optional count.

props.name: activeIndex
props.description: Index of the currently selected tab; one tab is always active.

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called when a tab is selected.

props.name: scrollable
props.description: Fixed = small known set that fits the width. Scrollable = many tabs that overflow; the bar scrolls.

doThis: Use tabs for peer views of one subject.
Reflect the active tab in the URL.
dontDoThis: Don't use tabs as primary site navigation.
Don't use tabs for a sequential, must-complete flow (use a stepper).
Don't overload with too many tabs — consider a different structure.
accessibility: Use the tablist/tab/tabpanel pattern; the active tab exposes aria-selected and arrow keys move between tabs.
Each panel is associated with its tab.
